rows.notes: Clear, centered year at top of page, no amounts present. Very legible handwriting.
Clear heading under the year; no monetary amounts in this line. Well centered and legible.
Columns located using vertical ruling. Numbers (58 | 1 | 7) are crisp and within valid ranges.
Clear inscription and amount (150 | 0 | 0). Column alignment unambiguous.
Clear text and amount (60 | 0 | 0). Numerals are distinct and columns align with ruling lines.
Clear entry and amount (50 | 0 | 0). Handwriting and digits unambiguous.
Description and figures (100 | 0 | 0) clearly written; alignment with pounds/shillings/pence columns apparent.
Description legible though cursive. Amount reads 3 | 3 | 0 aligned to columns; small ambiguity only in spacing of description.
Description 'Doctor care of Library' is readable; amount (15 | 0 | 0) is clear and fits column boundaries.

This line is heavily struck through (crossed out). Underneath numerals read 25 | 0 | 0 but the strikethrough obscures some strokes; included because amounts are still visible beneath the crossing-out.
Abbreviated 'Exhibn'' in description; amount columns clearly show 2 | 1 | 0. Minor uncertainty in exact spelling of 'advertisment' due to handwriting.
Description legible though somewhat compact; amount (9 | 0 | 0) clearly aligned in the columns.
Second 'Local Rate' entry; numerals (54 | 15 | 7) are clear and within valid ranges. Vertical ruling used for alignment.
'Do do' (ditto) description is clear; amount (3 | 6 | 0) well-aligned and legible.
Clear label and amount (59 | 7 | 6). A small pencil/ink cross mark appears to the left but does not obscure figures.
Surname looks like 'Lymm' or possibly 'Tymm' — handwriting ambiguous. Amount (139 | 0 | 6) is well aligned and clear; uncertainty only in the name reading.
Name reads as 'Maffey' (legible cursive). Amount (18 | 16 | 6) clear and within valid ranges; small flourish on letters introduces minor uncertainty in exact spelling.
Surname 'Parker' legible; amount (1 | 14 | 0) clearly written and aligned.
Name 'Rowell' readable; numerals (6 | 13 | 0) clear. Slight ink variation but no ambiguity in digits.
Text 'Quadrangle Gardener' clearly written (this is a second gardener-related line distinct from the struck-through one). Amount (11 | 3 | 0) clear.
Name and amount (13 | 19 | 0) are crisply written and align with column rules. Shillings 19 within valid range.
Name 'Nunney' legible. Pence column shows '7' with a small trailing loop identified as 'ob' (halfpenny) — interpreted as 0.5. All values now valid (pence 7 + 1/2).
Surname 'Thomas' clear; amount (74 | 9 | 6) legible and aligned. Minor ink fade but digits unambiguous.
Legible business name 'Gill & Co'; amount (12 | 4 | 1) clear. Small flourish on ampersand but no ambiguity in numbers.
Name 'Knowles' readable; figures (40 | 11 | 1) clear and columns well aligned.

Surname appears as 'Slatter' (could be 'Platter' or 'Flatter' depending on initial letter flourish). Ampersand and 'Rose' are legible. Amount (1 | 18 | 0) is clear but the first letter of the name is uncertain.

Final total located at page bottom under ruled line. Numerals read 1213 | 1 | 11 with a halfpenny indicated by a small loop ('ob') interpreted as 0.5. Alignment clear; slight ink smudge on pence fraction but interpretation consistent with notation elsewhere (halfpenny).
